news.summary: Globalink Investment Inc. (OTC Pink: GLLI, GLLIW, GLLIR, GLLIU), a special purpose acquisition company, recently announced an extension of the deadline to complete its initial business combination. On June 5, 2025, the company deposited $0.15 per public share, totaling $10,890.15, into its Trust Account with Continental Stock Transfer and Trust Company. This extends the deadline from June 9, 2025 to July 9, 2025. This marks the twenty-fourth extension since the company's initial public offering on December 9, 2021, and is the first of up to six extensions permitted under the current governing documents.
news.headline: Globalink Investment Inc. extends business combination deadline to July 9, 2025 with $0.15 per share Extension Payment of $10,890.15.

news.summary: On June 6, 2025, 89bio, Inc. disclosed the approval from the Compensation Committee of the Company’s Board of Directors for the issuance of non-qualified stock options. These options allow the purchase of a total of 61,100 shares of the Company’s common stock. The stock options were granted to three new employees on June 3, 2025, as part of the 2023 Inducement Plan. This action was taken to attract these individuals to join the company and aligns with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). 89bio is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm concentrating on creating and marketing novel treatments for liver and cardiometabolic ailments.
news.headline: 89bio granted 61,100 stock options to 3 new employees on June 3, 2025 as inducement to join the company.

news.summary: In Phoenix, Virginia G. Piper Charitable Trust named Laura Smith as the new director of Eyes On Learning, a coalition working to enhance the vision health of children in Arizona. Reports show that around 1 in 4 school-age children in the state have vision issues that could impact their learning. The initiative focuses on promoting healthy vision among kids, particularly crucial during early childhood and primary school years, where literacy skills are developed for successful learning outcomes.
news.headline: Laura Smith named director of Eyes On Learning by Virginia G. Piper Charitable Trust in Arizona, helping 1-in-4 school-age children with vision problems.

news.summary: In Woburn, Massachusetts on June 6, 2025, Replimune Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: REPL), a leading biotechnology organization focused on innovative oncolytic immunotherapies, revealed the issuance of equity awards as incentives to fresh non-executive workers.
news.headline: Replimune Announces Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)

news.summary: LEXINGTON, Mass - Keros Therapeutics, Inc. unveiled that their Chair and Chief Executive Officer Jasbir S. Seehra, Ph.D., is set to engage in a fireside chat at the Goldman Sachs 46th Annual Global Healthcare Conference on June 9, 2025, starting at 9:20 a.m. Eastern time. Keros, operating under the symbol Nasdaq: KROS, is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing and distributing new therapeutics catering to individuals with disorders associated with malfunctioning signaling of the transforming growth factor-beta (“TGF-ß”) protein family.
news.headline: Keros Therapeutics to attend Goldman Sachs conference on June 9, 2025, with CEO Dr. Seehra presenting at 9:20 a.m. Eastern time. ($KROS)

news.summary: Today, the stock market witnessed a significant increase in the Dow Jones, rising by 400 points due to a strong jobs report. Amazon also experienced a notable jump as it considers a new buy point. The S&P 500 reached a crucial level, and Microsoft surpassed Nvidia to claim the top spot. Additionally, discussions on China trade further impacted market dynamics.
news.headline: Dow Jones up by 400 points as Trump post boosts market, S&P 500 hits key level. Amazon eyes new buy point.
Zealand Pharma raises its share capital after employees exercise warrants.

news.summary: Arcutis Biotherapeutics, a biopharmaceutical company based in Westlake Village, California, recently granted a total of 72,000 restricted stock units of its common stock to nine new employees. The awards, which were authorized by the Compensation Committee of Arcutis’ Board of Directors, were issued under the Arcutis Biotherapeutics, Inc. 2022 Inducement Plan on June 2, 2025. This move was deemed necessary to attract and retain new talent, in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.headline: Arcutis Biotherapeutics granted 72,000 restricted stock units to 9 new employees under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.summary: The upcoming WWDC event in 2025 by Apple is expected to be a more subdued affair due to disappointment caused by the company's performance in the previous conference. Apple had promised much but failed to meet expectations last year. This led to a decrease in the level of excitement surrounding the upcoming event, potentially resulting in lower media coverage compared to previous years.
news.headline: Apple's WWDC 2025 likely to be low-key due to last year's disappointments, facing AI issues.

news.summary: CareTrust REIT has demonstrated improving price performance, resulting in an upgrade to its IBD Relative Strength Rating. This upgrade reflects the company's strong financial performance in comparison to its peers. This signifies a positive trend for the stock, indicating increasing investor interest.
news.headline: CareTrust REIT stock receives a technical rating upgrade due to rising price performance in IBD Relative Strength Rating.

news.summary: In May, ACADIA Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ: ACAD) received a favorable ruling from the U.S. District Court for the District of Delaware concerning its '721 formulation patent for Nuplazid (pimavanserin), a drug used in the treatment of Parkinson's Disease Psychosis. The court ruled in favor of Acadia on infringement and validity arguments in the patent litigation against Aurobindo Pharma Limited and other ANDA filers. CEO Catherine Owen Adams expressed satisfaction with the ruling, emphasizing that it extends patent protection for NUPLAZID 34 mg capsule formulation until 2038. Following the ruling, JPMorgan analysts viewed it as a significant positive development. The stock of Acadia Pharmaceuticals (ACAD) surged by 26% after the patent court victory. Analyst Tessa T. Romero highlighted the potential for an appeal of the ruling by the involved parties.
news.headline: JPMorgan increases Acadia price target; court rules in favor of Nuplazid patent protection. ACAD stock surges 26%.

news.summary: On June 6, 2025, in Scottsdale, Arizona, Wild About Sprouts® is celebrating World Food Safety Day on June 7 by highlighting its innovative Cold-Grown® process. This patented method has transformed food safety norms in the sprouting sector. Having achieved significant impact, Wild About Sprouts® has set new benchmarks for quality assurance. Established as a leader in the industry, their Cold-Grown® process has surpassed industry standards, marking a remarkable shift in ensuring food safety.
news.headline: Wild About Sprouts® marks World Food Safety Day with Cold-Grown® Technology for safer, more nutritious sprouts. #Innovation #Nutrition #WorldFoodSafetyDay.

news.summary: SKEL has recently finalized purchase agreements with a consortium of domestic institutional investors to acquire 153.9 million shares in Styrkás hf., totaling more than 15.4% of the company’s total issued share capital. The transaction amounts to ISK 3,150 million, translating to ISK 20.47 per share. This sale price mirrors SKEL’s stake in Styrkás as of December 31, 2024. The completion of these purchase agreements hinges on standard conditions, set to be concluded by next week.
news.headline: SKEL sells 15.4% stake in Styrkás for ISK 3.15 billion to investors at ISK 20.47 per share, subject to finalization next week.

news.summary: Accusations linking the president to the cryptocurrency sector and accusations of "Trump derangement syndrome" have complicated negotiations regarding a market structure bill in Congress.
news.headline: Partisan claims cloud crypto market hearing with president's ties to industry and "Trump derangement syndrome" accusations.

news.summary: On June 6, 2025, Seeds of Fortune Inc., a non-profit organization focused on empowering youth economically, revealed a new collaboration with acclaimed actress and producer Marsai Martin and her foundation, Marsai's Way. This partnership is set to span three years and will involve a substantial sum of financial support.
news.headline: Seeds of Fortune Inc. and Marsai Martin partner to empower 10,000 young women with financial education.

news.summary: A California-based fintech platform, Solar Mosaic, specializing in U.S. residential solar and energy-efficient home improvements, disclosed today that it has initiated Chapter 11 bankruptcy proceedings in the United States Bankruptcy Court for the Southern District of Texas. The company aims to undergo a restructuring and recapitalization, as part of which it submitted voluntary petitions for relief under Chapter 11 of the U.S. Bankruptcy Code. This strategic move is supported by specific stakeholders and marks a significant step in navigating the financial challenges faced by the company.
news.headline: Mosaic filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy, aiming to restructure and recapitalize with lender support to ensure future growth.

news.summary: Gambaryan, a departing executive from the crypto exchange, is one of several Binance executives to leave in the last two years. He is resigning to pursue opportunities in either the public or private sector.
news.headline: Binance executive Tigran Gambaryan exits after Nigerian hostage crisis. His departure adds to the rising trend of executives leaving the firm in recent years.
Week Ahead: Economic Indicators (US)

news.summary: The cryptocurrency market is experiencing a mixture of trends as the week draws to a close. Bitcoin has risen by 1.4%, reaching $104,572.38, while major altcoins are struggling. Ethereum is down by 3.3% at $2,495.00, Solana is slightly lower by 0.4% at $148.95, XRP has increased by 0.3% to $2.16, Dogecoin has decreased by 0.05% to $0.1792, and Shiba Inu is down by 1.1%, standing at $0.00001245. Data from IntoTheBlock indicates a 3.6% decrease in large transaction volume but a 5.6% growth in daily active addresses. The number of transactions exceeding $100,000 has risen from 11,237 to 11,851 in a single day, while exchanges netflows have dropped by 45.6%. Coinglass data reveals that 199,310 traders were liquidated in the past 24 hours, resulting in losses of $850.45 million. In other news, WisdomTree's Jason Guthrie predicts Blockchain's AWS moment, and the DOJ aims to seize $7.7 million in Bitcoin, Ethereum, and NFTs allegedly laundered by North Korean entities. (Character count: 898)
news.headline: Bitcoin rises by 1.4%, Ethereum drops by 3.3%. Significant altcoins struggle as crypto market shows mixed signals.

news.summary: A company receiving taxpayer funds, Sutphen Corporation, in Urbana, Ohio, has refused to negotiate with Teamsters Local 284, prompting the expansion of picket lines. The strike initiated on May 28 and has now spread to the Urbana facility. The company's decision to bring in replacement workers has escalated tensions. The number of employees participating in the strike and picketing has increased in response to these actions.
news.headline: Teamsters Local 284 extends strike against Sutphen Corp to Urbana facility in Ohio due to unfair labor practices, refusing to bargain.

news.summary: DKR Films will be hosting an exclusive screening event for the award-winning documentary "There Are Things To Do," directed by Mike Syers and produced by Fermín Rojas. The event is scheduled for Monday, June 9th from 1:00 PM to 3:00 PM at Room 428 in the Massachusetts State House. The documentary, which runs for 18 minutes, highlights the life and impact of Urvashi Vaid, an immigrant, LGBTQ+ activist, author, and trailblazer. Vaid's vision has significantly influenced the modern LGBTQ+ movement and serves as an inspiration for changemakers worldwide.
news.headline: Pride Month event at Massachusetts State House on June 9 (1-3pm) featuring an exclusive screening of documentary on LGBTQ+ activist Urvashi Vaid.

news.summary: President Trump has announced that key American economic officials are scheduled to meet with Chinese counterparts next Monday in an effort to resolve the ongoing trade deadlock between the two countries. This crucial meeting is expected to address significant economic issues and aims to facilitate progress in negotiations.
news.headline: US, China to discuss trade in London. American officials to meet Chinese counterparts on Monday to resolve trade issues.

news.summary: JPMorgan analyst Pinjalim Bora has reduced Braze, Inc.'s (NASDAQ: BRZE) price forecast from $45 to $47, while maintaining an Overweight rating. The company reported quarterly earnings of seven cents per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of five cents per share. Sales were reported at $162.06 million, exceeding the estimated $158.66 million by analysts. Braze revised its FY2026 adjusted EPS guidance from 31 cents to 35 cents but raised the sales outlook from $686 million-$691 million to $702 million-$706 million. The analyst highlights Braze's strong start to the year.
news.headline: JPMorgan downgrades Braze (NASDAQ: BRZE) but raises sales outlook to $702-$706 million for FY2026. Braze posts earnings of seven cents/share, beating estimates.

news.summary: During the meeting on June 6, 2025, the Supervisory Board of Silvano Fashion Group AS gave their approval for the annual report of the company for the financial year 2024. The report will be presented to the shareholders at the upcoming general meeting.
news.headline: Silvano Fashion Group AS approved their 2024 annual report for submission to shareholders in a June 2025 board meeting.

news.summary: On June 6, 2025, a L. Ron Hubbard Landmark Site in Phoenix was officially unveiled to celebrate the merging of Dianetics and Scientology. The site, located at 4451 East Osborn Road, marks a significant moment in history and pays tribute to a period of profound change. This midcentury building has been identified as a symbol of this unity and will serve as a reminder of this transformative era for generations to come.
news.headline: New L. Ron Hubbard Landmark Site at 4451 E Osborn Rd in Phoenix unifies Dianetics & Scientology, marking a transformative era in history.

news.summary: PG&E's comprehensive wildfire prevention measures successfully averted a significant wildfire in both 2023 and 2024. The company, headquartered in San Ramon, California, utilized advanced technologies like artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning to continually track wildfire risks. By implementing a series of proven protective strategies, PG&E effectively maintained control over potential fire threats. This proactive approach underscores PG&E's commitment to safeguarding the community and environment.
news.headline: PG&E shows readiness for 2025 wildfire season after preventing major wildfires in 2023 and 2024. AI and ML used for monitoring.

news.summary: In the bustling city of Dallas on June 6th, 2025, Subsplash, known for pioneering church technology, unveiled Subsplash Tap. This innovative contactless tool redefines the way churchgoers interact, donate, and participate, revolutionizing their experience. Through a simple tap on their phones, users can seamlessly make payments, exchange information, or access websites, reflecting the seamless integration of digital technology into our daily lives.
news.headline: Subsplash introduces Subsplash Tap, revolutionizing church giving & engagement. Contactless solution enhances connectivity.

news.summary: Atlanta, GA now hosts an expanded distribution operation for Synthetic Grass Warehouse (SGW) as of June 6, 2025. Recognized as an industry frontrunner, SGW offers secure and long-lasting synthetic turf solutions as an alternative to natural grass. This move serves to enhance SGW's reach and presence in the market.
news.headline: Synthetic Grass Warehouse expands to Atlanta, GA on June 6, 2025, leading in artificial grass industry.
